title: Tasnim counts Trump's 38th identical deal-imminence claim in two months
snippet: IRGC-affiliated Tasnim News Agency counted Trump's latest statement as his 38th identical deal-imminence claim in two months. This functions as a credibility metric and skepticism signal from IRGC media, contrasting with Fars News's 'high probability' positive signal from June 13.
tag_reason: 6/13 IRGC 이중 메시지 (Fars 긍정 vs Tasnim 유보)의 후속 — Tasnim의 38회 카운트라는 구체적 회의 지표 추가
